allow: PowerShell(cd "c:\\projetos\\tedioflix"; Start-Process -NoNewWindow -FilePath "php" -ArgumentList "artisan", "serve", "--port=8000" -PassThru | Out-Null; Start-Sleep -Seconds 3; try { Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:8000" -TimeoutSec 5 -UseBasicParsing | Select-Object StatusCode, @{N='Size';E={$_.Content.Length}} } catch { "Erro: $_" })

PowerShell(cd "c:\\projetos\\tedioflix"; Start-Job -ScriptBlock { Set-Location "c:\\projetos\\tedioflix"; php artisan serve --port=8000 } | Out-Null; Start-Sleep -Seconds 3; Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://127.0.0.1:8000" -TimeoutSec 8 -UseBasicParsing | Select-Object StatusCode, @{N='Size';E={$_.Content.Length}})
